case_title: MISSION AREA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS LAUS, MONICA E.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO RESTORE CASE ON CALENDAR, FILED. THE DISMISSAL ENTERED ON 3/19/03 BE VACATED. CASE CALENDARED FOR HEARING ON 5/1/03 AT 3:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-03-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-19-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 3/19/03, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED TO 4/3/03. PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 4/3/03, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-19-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-01-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER COURT ORDER TO RESTORE CASE ON CALENDAR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA E.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,403.62 FILED BY MISSION AREA  FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISSION AREA  FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA E. $603.62 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $675.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA E.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-13-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE 1ST PAYMENT, NO APPERANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 3-3-03 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 15 DAYS FOR THE FINAL PAYMENT.
